message:
feat: add contributor hover card on leaderboard usernames (#1502)

Show a compact preview card when hovering over a contributor's name on
the leaderboard table. The card lazy-fetches the contributor's profile
JSON (cached in-memory) and shows: avatar, level, rank, points,
contribution cadence (streak, by-day heatmap, by-hour grid), activity
timeline sparkline, and a link to the full profile page.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
